metadata.description: A focused engineering skill pack for idea refinement, reviewed specification-and-plan bundles, brief dated change plans, design interrogation, secure session handoffs, bounded contract-driven review-and-fix, project-memory initialization with opt-in agent discovery, proposal-first architecture synchronization, pre-merge review decisions, and simplification.

plugins.name: oh-my-zz
plugins.description: Ten focused engineering skills for shaping ideas into reviewed specification-and-plan bundles, making brief dated change plans, interrogating designs, handing off work between agent sessions, independently reviewing and repairing approved implementations, initializing project memory with opt-in agent discovery, reviewing implementation scope before explicitly approved architecture synchronization, making pre-merge review decisions, and simplifying implementations.
